Atomos ( (AU:AMS) ) has issued an announcement.

Atomos Limited has notified the ASX of a proposed issue of up to 35,602,592 ordinary fully paid shares under a placement or other type of issue. The company has applied for these securities to be quoted on the ASX, with a proposed issue date of 31 May 2029, indicating a planned capital-raising initiative that may influence its funding capacity and capital structure.

By lodging this Appendix 3B, Atomos is signaling its intention to tap equity markets in accordance with ASX Listing Rules and related disclosure requirements. The sizeable maximum number of new shares, if fully issued, could have implications for existing shareholders through potential dilution, while providing the company with additional financial flexibility for future operational or strategic needs.

More about Atomos

Atomos Limited, listed on the ASX under the code AMS, is an Australian publicly traded company. It issues ordinary fully paid shares and operates under the ASX Listing Rules, accessing capital markets through placements and other security issues to support its corporate activities.

data.title: NPR-RIKEN to Acquire Hastings Holding, Aiming for Global Piston Ring Leadership
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION ( (JP:6209) ) just unveiled an announcement.

NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION has approved the acquisition of all shares in Hastings Holding Corp. by its U.S. subsidiary, Riken Corporation of America, which will make HHC a wholly owned unit pending regulatory notifications and approvals. HHC controls Hastings Manufacturing Company in the U.S. and Piston Rings Komarov in the Czech Republic, both long-established piston ring producers with strong reputations, particularly in North and Central America and Europe.

By adding the well-known Hastings brand, which holds a dominant share in the global piston ring aftermarket, NPR-RIKEN aims to secure its position as the top global player in piston rings. The companies’ complementary customer bases, applications, and sales regions are expected to generate production and sourcing synergies, bolstering competitiveness, profitability in the piston ring business, and long-term corporate value through broader market coverage and higher customer satisfaction.

More about NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION

NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION is a Japanese manufacturer focused on piston rings and related engine components, serving global automotive and industrial markets. Through its NPR and RIKEN brands, the group is already a leading player in the global piston ring sector and is pursuing a midterm strategy to transform its portfolio and expand into non-internal combustion engine fields while reinforcing core aftermarket businesses.

Average Trading Volume: 106,481

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen103.5B

Pareto Bank ASA ( (DE:8PB) ) just unveiled an update.

Pareto Bank ASA has scheduled the presentation of its first-quarter 2026 results for 30 April 2026, between 12:00 and 13:00 CET, at its Oslo premises in Dronning Mauds gate 3. Aurelia Metals ( (AU:AMI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Aurelia Metals Limited has announced the cessation of 478,044 performance rights that have lapsed because the conditions attached to them were not met or have become incapable of being satisfied. The lapse of these conditional rights reduces the company’s pool of potential future equity issuance and slightly tightens its capital structure, which may modestly affect dilution expectations for existing shareholders.

The cessation reflects performance or vesting hurdles not being achieved under the relevant incentive plan, signalling that specific internal targets tied to these rights were not fulfilled. While the operational impact is limited, the adjustment underscores the conditional nature of the company’s remuneration and incentive framework and may be noted by investors tracking governance and incentive alignment.

data.title: Core Lithium details financing, convertible notes and Glencore marketing deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Core Lithium Ltd ( (AU:CXO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Core Lithium has clarified a previously issued cleansing notice related to a major financing package, correcting only formatting while confirming the substance of its earlier disclosure. The company is progressing a multi-pronged funding strategy that includes a two-tranche A$120 million placement, a US$50 million secured senior loan, and a US$70 million secured convertible note facility with InfraVia and Glencore, alongside a marketing agreement under which Glencore will sell all spodumene concentrate from the Finniss Project.

Under the convertible note deeds, Core has issued 25,926,821 Tranche 1 convertible notes to InfraVia using existing placement capacity, enabling the eventual conversion shares to be freely traded by retail investors without further disclosure. Subject to shareholder approval and conditions precedent, a second tranche of 44,073,179 notes will follow to InfraVia and Glencore, and the board argues this structure, combined with the placement, best meets its funding needs in light of market conditions and the company’s financial position, supporting the Finniss Project’s development and strengthening its commercial ties with Glencore.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CXO) stock is a Buy with a A$0.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Core Lithium Ltd stock, see the AU:CXO Stock Forecast page.

More about Core Lithium Ltd

Core Lithium Ltd is an Australian lithium producer focused on developing and operating the Finniss Project in the Northern Territory. The company targets the global lithium battery supply chain, producing spodumene concentrate for use in electric vehicle and energy storage markets, and engages with institutional investors and strategic partners to fund project development.

data.title: Borr Drilling Ramps Up Middle East Activity and Lifts 2026 Contract Cover
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Borr Drilling ( (BORR) ) has issued an announcement.

Borr Drilling has resumed or is preparing to resume operations for its four jack-up rigs in the Middle East, with Arabia III already back working offshore Saudi Arabia and Groa, Arabia II and Forseti expected to restart in Qatar and the UAE during April 2026. In the Gulf of America, the Odin jack-up is now slated to begin its delayed contract with Cantium this month after additional maintenance work.

In Southeast Asia, the Skald rig has secured a six-month drilling campaign under a new binding letter of award from an undisclosed operator, starting in the second quarter of 2026. Reflecting these contract wins and restarted activity, Borr reports 70% fleet coverage for 2026 at an average dayrate of about $134,000, with management arguing that higher commodity prices and energy security concerns are driving increased rig demand that should support the company’s young fleet and near-term utilization.

The most recent analyst rating on (BORR) stock is a Hold with a $5.45 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Borr Drilling stock, see the BORR Stock Forecast page.

More about Borr Drilling

Borr Drilling Limited is an international offshore drilling contractor incorporated in Bermuda and listed in New York and Oslo. The company owns and operates a modern fleet of high-specification jack-up rigs, focusing on shallow-water drilling services for the global oil and gas industry.

Average Trading Volume: 7,365,409

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.82B

data.title: Arcs Company Extends Takeover Defense to Protect Long-Term Shareholder Interests
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Arcs Company ( (JP:9948) ) has issued an announcement.

Arcs Company’s board has resolved to continue its takeover response policies governing large-scale purchases of its shares beyond the upcoming 65th Annual General Meeting, with certain partial revisions to the existing plan. The move is framed as a safeguard to prevent control of financial and business policies from shifting to acquirers deemed inappropriate in light of the company’s basic policy on control.

The company emphasizes that, while it respects free trading of its stock and does not categorically oppose large-scale acquisitions, it seeks to ensure that any bidder provides sufficient information and time for evaluation and potential alternative proposals. All outside directors and audit and supervisory board members support the continued plan, which is positioned as part of broader efforts to protect and enhance corporate value and the common interests of shareholders over the medium to long term.

More about Arcs Company

Arcs Company, Limited is a pure holding company formed in 2002 through the integration of supermarket operators Ralse Company and Fukuhara in Hokkaido’s Tokachi and Obihiro regions. The group focuses on regional supermarket operations and aims to enhance medium- to long-term corporate value for a broad base of investors and shareholders through its management philosophy and governance initiatives.

Current Market Cap: Yen216.3B
